sections_cited: Section 100C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I. T. R. A. No. 108 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 775/2025. 2) For orders on CMA No. 719/2025. 3) For orders on CMA No. 720/2025. 4) For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025. Mr. Syed Wajid Hussain, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ 1) Granted. 2) Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3 & 4) At the very outset, learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that the controversy as raised in this matter in respect of required approval from the Chief Commissioner Inland Revenue to be eligible for claiming tax credit under Section 100C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 is already pending before this Court in number of cases including ITRA No. 29 of 2025, wherein, ad-interim order has been passed on 22.01.2025. He prays for the similar treatment as already granted by this Court in like cases. Let this Reference Application be admitted for regular hearing on the proposed question as recorded in ITRA No. 29/2025. Notice to the Respondents. Till then the Respondents shall not take any coercive measures against the Applicant pursuant the impugned order dated 29.01.2025. To come up along with ITRA No. 29/2025 and other connected matters on 15.04.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
